name: @gertvdb/locale
description: Simple, predictable locale management for React

scripts.dev: pnpm install && pnpm exec storybook dev -p 6006 --debug
scripts.build-github: pnpm run prettify && pnpm run test && pnpm exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm run build
scripts.build: pnpm run prettify && pnpm run test && pnpm exec tsup && pnpm exec storybook build
scripts.release:patch: pnpm install && pnpm run build && pnpm version patch --git-tag-version=false
scripts.release:minor: pnpm install && pnpm run build && pnpm version minor --git-tag-version=false
scripts.release:major: pnpm install && pnpm run build && pnpm version major --git-tag-version=false
